After all her children finished high school and college and left home, on Mother's Day she found a "money tree" in her yard with $100 in dollar bills taped to it. Marvin had planted the tree and left a note saying he owed eight hours of digging time. Marvin kept his promise by digging up a garden bed, and the other children gave her gardening tools and items.
